name: Exit Condition One Escape Room Demo

reviews.review_description: It is a stylish and well designed escape room!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for saying so, it means a lot! :)

reviews.review_description: Just need more puzzles

developer_response.body: Glad you liked it. Please note that it is a demo of the full game which is available at the following link and has 5 rooms and way more puzzles! Enjoy: https://www.meta.com/experiences/exit-condition-one-escape-room/4463936340397965/

reviews.review_description:
I love this gaem, I spent hours trying to figure a way 










PS. I meant to spell it wrong

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed it, thanks for your review and rating. You may also enjoy the full game.

reviews.review_description: I am really enjoying this escape room game! Its challenging but fun and I like that you can ask for a hint if you get stuck. I think the only downside is that you have to play the game all the way through without stopping. Unless I missed something it does not save progress. I had to log off when my kids needed something and when i logged back in I had to restart from the beginning.

developer_response.body: Glad you are enjoying it Mandy! You are right, it does not save progress. That is planned for the future, but not the immediate future. Also, note that some object locations are randomized so if you remember finding something in a place the first time through it may be different the next time through.

reviews.review_description: The game is good I am very interested in solving puzzles

developer_response.body: Glad you liked it! Stay tuned for the full version coming later this year.

reviews.review_description: Although a bit of a short and cliffhanger experience i do expect alot more to come from the great developer! The Art style is great and the game uses VR Mechanics in a unique way such as the drone puzzle.

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed it! Yes, more is coming for sure. 2 new puzzle types, 2 more rooms, and new variations and combinations of all of the puzzle types.

reviews.review_description:
A short escape room experience with a weird and creepy touch.
I really liked it and wish there were more rooms!

You can read more about my experience here: https://www.reddit.com/r/sidequest/comments/owedwt/exit_condition_room_flickering_lights_and_moving/

developer_response.body: Glad you liked it! Stay tuned, the game will definitely be expanding :)

reviews.review_description: The app it says that is purches but it doesn't open, please share a solution....Thank you

developer_response.body: Sorry you've had such an experience. Not sure why it is happening. Typically an upgrade to the latest version of the Oculus software and/or a reboot does the trick.

reviews.review_description: The demo was very fun. Hope for it to release as a full game!

developer_response.body: There is a full version of the game underway. An alpha version of the full game is available via the discord which is here: https://discord.gg/2NfBumhKQD

reviews.review_description: Très bon escape game mais malheureusement très court

developer_response.body: Merci! More rooms and more puzzles are planned.

reviews.review_description:
The room dimensions are too small for the amount of stuff in there. I was knee deep in trash before the end.

The UI is a little quirky, but shows promise.

The difficulty is about right, although they overuse one gimmick way too much, and one of the better puzzles was a dead end.

Maybe very slight spoiler, but I was hoping to have to run the drone through the air duct to maybe push something out (like maybe a ball?). Was a little disappointed there.

5* because its free. Make no mistake, this is not an “I expect you to die” caliber game, but it is a very solid game, and shows the potential of having traditional escape rooms in VR without having to be strapped to a chair. 

I think its biggest problem is the room is too cramped. Open it up a bit. I get the idea of keeping it the size of a play area, but if we can navigate an 18-hole golf course without walking into walls, I think we can handle a larger escape room.

developer_response.body: What an image of knee-deep in trash! :) Yes, the size and the clutter are often mentioned. In the .49 release I've started addressing that by making more things destructible . The size of the room was as an experiment to enable moving around with just one's feet. In the full game, coming early next year, the rooms will be more expansive and utilize the drone much more. This is also my first game, so a lot of learning to be done and feedback like this is very helpful, thanks! :)

reviews.review_description:
Very very short: 20 minutes and It was done buy It shows very good potential.
I am really waiting for the finale product.
Good work

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed it. The target for a full release is spring/summer of 2022.

reviews.review_description: This game is keeping every other game in my library from updating and I can’t uninstall it

developer_response.body: I'm very sorry to hear that you are having this issue. This appears to be a recent unresolved Oculus issue. I did a little looking around and found the following. It isn't much help, but at least the issue is acknowledged. You might try reaching out to Oculus directly to see if there is any update. https://forums.oculusvr.com/t5/Support/Can-t-Uninstall-Apps/td-p/932744

reviews.review_description: i like it its preety easy but i really want a 2nd part

developer_response.body: Glad you like it! It is just the demo. If you don't mind trying an alpha version, the alpha of the full game is available via the discord: https://discord.gg/2NfBumhKQD .

reviews.review_title: Is there more after the demo?
reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed trying to figure out this puzzle and thought maybe it was just the first room of many more. I only downloaded the demo if I purchase the game are thereother rooms to escape from?

developer_response.body: Yes, the paid version has 5 rooms. It is in early access, and is priced accordingly, but feels like a finished game. It is located here: https://www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/4463936340397965/

reviews.review_description:
You can grab everything anywhere. If you grab the leaded end of the pencil it freaks out and makes me happy.


Not too hard, but not easy. I hope they get more rooms soon:)

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and glad you liked it so much! :) We are currently focused on getting what is there now fully productized and will then move on to making the paid version which will add variations of the current puzzles throughout the rooms, two new puzzle types, and two more rooms.

reviews.review_description:
Granted I am a VR (and games) and escape room novice so maybe unreasonably over – wowed by this. But it is great fun to figure it out as you go. You can interact with every object and they follow the laws of physics. You knock on something and it makes that sound. Or in my case, hit it with a hammer because I don’t know what else to do next LOL.

Oh there was that one time when the hammer got stuck in the wall -- that was weird. 

Mainly I use the Quest for exercise, but this is a fascinating, Zenny place to hang out. So far it has provided me with hours (!!) of fun. (As I said, newbie.) 

Soon this puzzle will reveal itself! I hope the developers put out more like this.

developer_response.body: There is a walkthrough that reveals hints a piece at a time here: https://youtu.be/3B3kYnNYzHE . Also, more rooms and puzzle types will be coming with a paid release in the next few months. Glad you enjoyed it! :)

reviews.review_description: To be honest, I'm not a puzzle game lover but I had very great time on it. Great game design, great vibe, and lots of fun!

developer_response.body: Glad you gave it a try and had some fun!

reviews.review_description: It's a good puzzle game prety hard it could be batter if you put a help and a question the full version of exit condition one ( alpha) it will coming on oculus quest?

developer_response.body: Thanks! There is a help actually. Look at your left wrist and a holo screen will pop up with hints for you. Yes, the full version will be on the quest. The alpha of it is already available via itch.io and installable via sidequest.

reviews.review_description: cool game but i think if there were more maps with different difficulties it would be one of my favourite games . if there is more maps coming in the full version please could you tell me 😁

developer_response.body: Hi Tom! Thanks for the rating and review. Yes, the full version contains the elements of the demo, but not the demo room as is. There are currently 4 main rooms in the full game. You can get a sneak peak of all of them in the video on the sidequest page. And if you don't mind rough edges you can sideload a very early version of the full game. It is paid via sidequest but you can get it free via the discord. https://sidequestvr.com/app/6373/alpha-exit-condition-one-full-game
